stories.title: Trump’s tariff machine is no longer trade policy. Congress should say so.

stories.image_alt: House votes to extend Haiti protections, deepening Trump immigration fight

stories.title: IMF says tariff shock is clouding the 2026 outlook, with inflation and growth both under strain
stories.dek: The fund’s spring forecast revision lands just as trade policy uncertainty, higher energy costs and tighter financial conditions are reshaping the global economy.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: IMF says tariff shock is clouding the 2026 outlook, with inflation and growth both under strain

stories.title: NASA’s Artemis II photos sharpen the science case for a human return to the Moon
stories.dek: Fresh images from the crew’s lunar flyby are giving scientists a new look at Earth, the Moon and the deep-space environment just as NASA’s next crewed mission enters a pivotal spring stretch.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: NASA’s Artemis II photos sharpen the science case for a human return to the Moon

stories.title: Cannes 2026 doubles down on auteurs as the festival leans away from Hollywood
stories.dek: The 79th Cannes Film Festival unveiled a lineup heavy on international names, with Pedro Almodóvar, Paweł Pawlikowski and Ryusuke Hamaguchi among the marquee draws — and few major American studio films in sight.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Cannes 2026 doubles down on auteurs as the festival leans away from Hollywood

stories.title: OpenAI pushes an AI-industrial policy agenda as rivals tighten safety and defense lines
stories.dek: A wave of new policy papers from OpenAI and Anthropic shows how the AI industry is trying to shape the rules that will govern its next phase — from workforce disruption and compute access to military use and frontier safety.

stories.image_alt: OpenAI pushes an AI-industrial policy agenda as rivals tighten safety and defense lines
